2603.18611.title: Cross-Modal Rationale Transfer for Explainable Humanitarian Classification on Social Media
2603.18611.paper_summary: Advances in social media data dissemination enable the provision of real-time information during a crisis. The information comes from different classes, such as infrastructure damages, persons missing or stranded in the affected zone, etc. Existing methods attempted to classify text and images into various humanitarian categories, but their decision-making process remains largely opaque, which affects their deployment in real-life applications. Recent work has sought to improve transparency by extracting textual rationales from tweets to explain predicted classes. However, such explainable classification methods have mostly focused on text, rather than crisis-related images. In this paper, we propose an interpretable-by-design multimodal classification framework. Our method first learns the joint representation of text and image using a visual language transformer model and extracts text rationales. Next, it extracts the image rationales via the mapping with text rationales. Our approach demonstrates how to learn rationales in one modality from another through cross-modal rationale transfer, which saves annotation effort. Finally, tweets are classified based on extracted rationales. Experiments are conducted over CrisisMMD benchmark dataset, and results show that our proposed method boosts the classification Macro-F1 by 2-35% while extracting accurate text tokens and image patches as rationales. Human evaluation also supports the claim that our proposed method is able to retrieve better image rationale patches (12%) that help to identify humanitarian classes. Our method adapts well to new, unseen datasets in zero-shot mode, achieving an accuracy of 80%.
2603.18611.paper_summary_zh: 社交媒體數據傳播的進步使得在危機期間提供即時信息成為可能。這些信息來自不同的類別，例如基礎設施損壞、失踪或被困在受影響區域的人員等。現有的方法試圖將文本和圖像分類為各種人道主義類別，但其決策過程仍然在很大程度上不透明，這影響了它們在現實應用中的部署。最近的研究試圖通過從推文中提取文本理據來提高透明度，以解釋預測的類別。然而，這些可解釋的分類方法主要集中在文本上，而不是與危機相關的圖像。在本文中，我們提出了一種設計上可解釋的多模態分類框架。我們的方法首先使用視覺語言Transformer模型學習文本和圖像的聯合表示並提取文本理據。接下來，它通過與文本理據的映射提取圖像理據。我們的方法展示了如何通過跨模態理據轉移從一種模態學習理據，這樣可以節省標註工作。最後，推文根據提取的理據進行分類。實驗在CrisisMMD基準數據集上進行，結果顯示我們提出的方法將分類的Macro-F1提高了2-35%，同時提取準確的文本標記和圖像片段作為理據。人類評估也支持我們提出的方法能夠檢索更好的圖像理據片段（12%），這有助於識別人道主義類別。我們的方法在零樣本模式下對新的、未見過的數據集適應良好，達到80%的準確率。
2603.18611.author: Thi Huyen Nguyen et.al.
2603.18611.authors: Thi Huyen Nguyen, Koustav Rudra, Wolfgang Nejdl
